items.title: Anfernee Simons says his left wrist injury is “pretty much completely healed now.” Simons says he hasn’t felt anything there in a long time.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons says his left wrist injury is “pretty much completely healed now.” Simons says he hasn’t felt anything there in a long time.

items.title: Anfernee Simons said Jameer Nelson called his parents to recruit him. Simons had high praise for all of the Sixers' Big 4. Mentioned watching Jaylen Brown's two-way prowess up close last season. Said he's happy to get the catch-and-shoot opportunities Joel Embiid will provide.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons said Jameer Nelson called his parents to recruit him. Simons had high praise for all of the Sixers' Big 4. Mentioned watching Jaylen Brown's two-way prowess up close last season. Said he's happy to get the catch-and-shoot opportunities Joel Embiid will provide.

items.title: More from Simons on Nelson’s call to his parents: “That’s one thing that other teams didn’t do… I think that was one of the things that helped the pitch out pretty good, for sure.”
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: More from Simons on Nelson’s call to his parents: “That’s one thing that other teams didn’t do… I think that was one of the things that helped the pitch out pretty good, for sure.”

items.title: Simons: “That’s one thing other teams didn’t do, so that was one of the good selling points of me coming here and feeling like I’m needed here.”
items.author: Kyle Neubeck
items.body_excerpt: Simons: “That’s one thing other teams didn’t do, so that was one of the good selling points of me coming here and feeling like I’m needed here.”

items.title: On his fit with Joel Embiid, Anfernee Simons says “he’s a force in himself” and that he can take advantage of the attention always being on Embiid. “That makes the game easier for me… I love to get catch-and-shoots if that’s what the game allows me to get.”
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: On his fit with Joel Embiid, Anfernee Simons says “he’s a force in himself” and that he can take advantage of the attention always being on Embiid. “That makes the game easier for me… I love to get catch-and-shoots if that’s what the game allows me to get.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons suggested that VJ Edgecombe reminds him of Jaylen Brown in some ways — talked about them sharing a willingness to do whatever it takes to win and compete on both ends of the floor. “He can be a pretty special player.”
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons suggested that VJ Edgecombe reminds him of Jaylen Brown in some ways — talked about them sharing a willingness to do whatever it takes to win and compete on both ends of the floor. “He can be a pretty special player.”

items.title: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Anfernee Simons is eager to play on and off the ball with the Sixers. He said he knows Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe have handled major workloads and he is here to relieve them of some pressure.

items.title: Can confirm, per sources, that Knicks star Jalen Brunson will undergo surgery to repair an injured left wrist that caused discomfort during playoffs, where he averaged 28.4 points and scored 45 to win the title.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt:
Can confirm, per sources, that Knicks star Jalen Brunson will undergo surgery to repair an injured left wrist that caused discomfort during playoffs, where he averaged 28.4 points and scored 45 to win the title.

He’ll be able to resume basketball activities later this summer.

The Raptors are retiring Kyle Lowry's #7. He's officially retiring as a Toronto Raptor.

His franchise ranks, regular season & playoffs:
1st in wins
1st in assists
1st in threes
2nd in points

Raptors have 1 playoff series win without Kyle Lowry. They have 9 series wins with him.

items.title: Donaldson delivering Hurricanes grit to summer Heat, "My football side shows, for sure." www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/07/d... Wayne Ellington, "He causes havoc. He has a knack for the ball."
items.author: Ira Winderman
items.body_excerpt: Donaldson delivering Hurricanes grit to summer Heat, "My football side shows, for sure." www.sun-sentinel.com/2026/07/07/d... Wayne Ellington, "He causes havoc. He has a knack for the ball."

media.title: Donaldson delivering Hurricanes grit to summer Heat, ‘ My football side shows, for sure’
media.description: You can see it on offense, the ability to probe, a quarterback on that end. You can see it on defense, roaming like a safety, ready to create a turnover. Tre Donaldson says it’s all innate.

items.title: Webster on Lowry: “I think watching him play basketball stirred everybody’s heart. ... Every possession for him was life and death.”
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
Webster on Lowry: “I think watching him play basketball stirred everybody’s heart. ... Every possession for him was life and death.”

Webster refers to an "almost" Lowry trade in 2019.

media.title: Agent: Donovan Mitchell reaches new 4-year deal with Cavs
media.description: Donovan Mitchell has agreed to a 4-year, $273 million maximum extension with the Cavs, including a player option for the 2030-31 season, per his agent.
